problem id: 4c8182b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00001001 -> 00100101
  10110000 -> 11010110
  10010100 -> 01000010
  00111010 -> 11101111
  11011100 -> 01101011
  11000110 -> 00000000
  01010001 -> 01001110
  10010011 -> 01011110
  00101011 -> 10101001

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 10001100
